# Real Property Planning — David Stein

Real Property Planning provides specialized real estate guidance for probate and estate property sales, senior transitions, and trust-owned real estate throughout Washington State, with deep experience across Western Washington and the Puget Sound region.

## Who we serve
Attorneys, executors, trustees, fiduciaries, and families navigating the sale of inherited or estate-owned property. Also serves seniors and families transitioning from longtime homes to assisted living or smaller housing. Clients throughout Washington State and, through eXp Realty's referral network, connections to trusted brokers across the U.S. and internationally.

## What makes us different
David Stein holds dual credentials as a Washington State licensed real estate broker (eXp Realty) and a Washington State certified residential appraiser — over 20 years of combined experience. This dual expertise means clients receive both professional valuation insight and skilled brokerage representation in one relationship.

## Services
- Probate and estate property sales
- Trust-owned real estate sales
- Senior transitions and downsizing support
- Valuation-informed pricing strategy

## Areas served
Washington State, with a strong focus in King County, Snohomish County, Pierce County, Skagit County, and Kitsap County across Western Washington and the Puget Sound region. Cities include Seattle, Bellevue, Kirkland, Redmond, Mercer Island, Issaquah, Everett, Edmonds, Tacoma, Gig Harbor, Bainbridge Island, and more. Through eXp Realty's referral network, David can also connect clients with trusted brokers across the United States and internationally.

## Contact
Phone: (206) 900-3015
Email: info@realpropertyplanning.com
Website: https://www.realpropertyplanning.com
